user.title: Helios Forecast — panel line
user.description: One forecast for one panel line (a group of co-oriented panels). Add the integration again for each additional line. Leave the location blank to use your Home Assistant home.

data.name: Name (e.g. South roof)
data.azimuth: Azimuth (degrees from north, 90 = east, 180 = south, 270 = west)
data.production_entity: PV production sensor (for the learned correction)

init.title: Helios Forecast — panel line
init.description: Edit this panel line's orientation and settings.

data.azimuth: Azimuth (degrees from north, 90 = east, 180 = south, 270 = west)
data.production_entity: PV production sensor (for the learned correction)

legacy_multi_array.title: {name}: multiple panel lines in one entry
legacy_multi_array.description: "{name}" was set up with several panel arrays in a single entry, which is no longer supported. Each panel line now needs its own entry so it gets its own forecast entities. Delete this entry and add Helios Forecast once per panel line.
